message:
feat(observability,recovery): add ATC replay corpus, forensic bundle replay tests, recovery stall detection, canary namespace isolation, and composition rule fixes

Hardening observability, resilience, and test coverage across multiple
subsystems in the durability audit program:

**Recovery stall detection (robot.rs, startup_checks.rs):**
New tests for format_duration_human and format_recovery_elapsed covering
seconds/minutes/hours formatting. Tests validate RecoveryStatus struct
serialization including elapsed_secs, elapsed_display, stall_detected,
stall_reason, and deferred_write_backlog fields. Wired to br-rqv3i.7
to make stalled recovery visible to operators.

**Canary namespace isolation (pool.rs):**
Tests for CANARY_PREFIX constants, is_canary_identifier,
canary_agent_name, canary_storage_root, and is_canary_path confirming
that canary probes (__canary_*) are namespace-segregated from production
data, preventing accidental cross-contamination. Tied to br-97gc6.5.2.6.5.4.

**ATC replay corpus (atc.rs, atc_replay.rs):**
Promote private methods to pub(crate) (note_reservation_granted/released/
conflicts, eprocess_mut, cusum_mut) and add agent_alive_posterior().
New atc_replay.rs provides a full deterministic scenario corpus —
synthetic timelines, expected outcomes at milestones, reproducible seeds
for unit, replay, E2E, and perf harnesses.

**Forensic bundle replay tests (forensic_bundle_replay.rs):**
Replays forensic bundles through recovery harnesses, diffing resulting
DB state against expected outcomes. Covers clean reconstruct, salvage
merge, drift detection, interrupted/corrupt bundles, and multi-project
scenarios.

**ATC composition rule corrections (atc_composition.rs):**
Two interaction rules changed from Feeds to Modulates (cross-tick
clarifications), one from ForcesReset to Vetoes. Fix inverted
timescale-crossing validation (was checking wrong direction — fast-
forces-slow is the actual authority inversion).

**Warning flood gate tests (diagnostics.rs):**
Tests for WarningFloodGate covering empty state, within-cap, over-cap
suppression, and per-category independence.

**Canary metrics in KPI (kpi.rs, backpressure.rs, lib.rs):**
CanaryMetricsSnapshot added to GlobalMetricsSnapshot test helper,
keeping it compilable after the canary metrics addition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -126,6 +126,11 @@ pub use pool::{
     MutatingSurface, OverloadPolicy, RecoveryAction, RecoveryAdmissionStatus, RecoveryApproval,
     ReplayCompensationLog, ReplayCompensationRecord, ReplayResult,
     ResolvedMailboxSqlitePath, WriteRouteDisposition,
+    // Canary namespace, metrics, and alert-isolation policy (br-97gc6.5.2.6.5.4)
+    CanaryAlertPolicy, CanaryAlertTier,
+    CANARY_AGENT_PREFIX, CANARY_PREFIX, CANARY_PROJECT_SLUG, CANARY_STORAGE_DIR_PREFIX,
+    canary_agent_name, canary_mailbox_created, canary_mailbox_destroyed, canary_storage_root,
+    classify_canary_outcome, is_canary_identifier, is_canary_path, record_canary_probe,
     auto_pool_size, create_pool, deferred_write_queue, evaluate_write_route,
     ensure_sqlite_file_healthy, ensure_sqlite_file_healthy_with_archive, get_or_create_pool,
     inspect_mailbox_db_inventory, inspect_mailbox_recovery_lock, inspect_mailbox_sidecar_state,
